title: Container Style Queries
description: Build an adaptive component that changes its appearance based on a parent's custom property values using container style queries
html:
Default Card

Styled by container style query.

Featured Card

This card detects its parent's --variant property.

Danger Card

Adaptive styling without class changes.

validationRules.message: Wrapper should have container-type: normal for style queries

hints.text: Container style queries use @container style(--property: value) to match based on a parent's custom property. No size containment needed - use container-type: normal.
Use @container style(--variant: featured) { .csq-card { background: blue; color: white; } } to style cards based on their parent's --variant value.
Define container-type: normal on wrapper. Use @container style() queries for each variant.
